ratings.comment: Professor Ragsdale really cares about his students. His lecture slides were very clear on what we had to know and provided a lot of practice problems. He is a little bit of a nervous lecturer but has all good intentions. The readings for class were helpful but definitely not mandatory.

Dr. Ragsdale was a great professor! He provided many lecture quizzes covering all the content from class that was very helpful for the exam. His lectures were clear and he explained things well. Didn't think I would enjoy evolution as much as I did!
